creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p9
dovecot 2.3.1 (8e2f634)

When the PC is initially started, the following error message is displayed:

doveconf: Error: t_readlink(/var/run/dovecot/dovecot.conf) failed: readlink() failed: No such file or directory

After this, dovecot starts normally.

I cannot find any apparent reason for this error message, including the fact that it only occurs on initial boot-up of the machine. Subsequent restarts of dovecot work correctly.
